query: What was Iqbal F. Qadir on when he participated in an attack on a radar station located on western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula?
generated_answer: Iqbal Fazl Quadir was participating in an attack on a radar station located on the western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula when he participated in the second war with India. The radar station in question is situated near Dwarka, India.
